description: Composite card on an off-white paper-textured background. At the top is the 'Washington Examiner' masthead (with its eagle and flag emblem) followed by a bold black serif headline: 'DHS and ICE deserve praise for arresting 5,000 illegal migrants in Los Angeles,' with byline 'By Christopher Tremoglie, August 27, 2025 12:58 pm.' Below the headline is a 3-row by 4-column grid of twelve photographs of people: a mix of booking photos and arrest photos (several show people handcuffed beside officers in 'POLICE/ICE' tactical vests, one in a transport van, one against a wall with a posted 'NO LOITERING / NO TRESPASSING' sign). The men and women shown are of varied ages and ethnicities. Tweet text: '5,000 illegal aliens detained in Los Angeles. The worst of the worst taken out of our neighborhoods: cartel members, rapists, pedophiles, murderers, drug dealers and more.'
notable_text: Washington Examiner | DHS and ICE deserve praise for arresting 5,000 illegal migrants in Los Angeles | By Christopher Tremoglie, August 27, 2025
